name: INTELLIGENT PROTECTION MANAGEMENT CORP.
business: The company provides IT-related services including managed IT security, secure private cloud hosting, managed backup and disaster recovery, professional services, procurement services, and web hosting, and also offers ManyCam live streaming software. It serves large enterprise and commercial clients as well as small-and-medium sized businesses across the United States. Following the divestiture of its consumer applications, the company is now focused on IT and cloud-based solutions.

exposures.sentence: Our managed IT security services provide clients with ongoing management and support of their IT systems and services under a subscription or contract-based model.
We operate a secure private cloud from private suites in completely isolated areas that are leased within two Tier 3 data center facilities located in Phoenix, Arizona, and Edison, New Jersey.
We actively engage with third parties to enhance our secure private cloud offerings with artificial intelligence (AI) features and benefits.

We are subject to periodic examination by regulators under the authority of the Federal Financial Institutions Examination Council (FFIEC) under its Guidance on the Supervision of Technology Services Providers and the Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act of 1999, and federal, state and other laws that apply to technology service providers for financial institutions, as a result of the services we provide to the institutions and entities they regulate.

We also offer and support our ManyCam software, which is a live streaming software and virtual camera that allows users to deliver professional live videos on streaming platforms, video conferencing apps and distance learning tools.

catalysts.event: Launch of AI Data Readiness solution
catalysts.sentence: In addition, we are planning to launch an AI Data Readiness solution in the second quarter of 2026 that we believe will improve the reliability, security, and outcome of adopting AI technologies by assessing, structuring, and securing business data in a safe and effective manner.
